title: Pyrex Cook and Store Set of 3 Rectangular Glass Food Preparation and Storage Dishes with Lids (0.4L, 1.1L and 2.5L) BPA Free, Kitchen, Roasting, Freezing (Green - Pyrex Cook and Store Set of 3)
features: Part of the Pyrex Cook and Freeze range of cook – Store – freeze range while cutting down the need of single use plastics and helps keep food fresher for longer
Set of 3 rectangular glass oven dishes with lids made in France, convenient for cooking and storing leftovers. Ideal range for storage thanks to its ergonomic lid
Set of 3 rectangular dishes (17x10cm, 23x15cm, 28x20cm) for baking gratins, meats and preserving your leftovers

Straight edge borosilicate glass dishes. Healthy and hygienic material, resistant to extreme temperatures, from -40°C to +300°C, and thermal shock up to 220°C, making it possible to bake in the oven (without the lid), store in the fridge and freezer and warm in the microwave (without the lid). Dishwasher-safe
Stackable dishes for optimal storage and space saving in the fridge or freezer. Nesting dishes, place them in one another for space saving in your cupboards.
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page Cook & Store A box to suit every situation! Cook & Store, our ideal range for storing your food! Suitable for freezer and refrigerator Can be stored down to -40°C Dishwasher safe Hygienic material that won't accumulate stains or odours Easy to wash Cooking and reheating Oven and microwave (without lid) Wide handles for easy handling Deep dish easy to store and use Nesting boxes for optimum storage in your cupboard Stackable for easy storage Next page 1 Discover Cook & Store 2 Store 3 Easy to wash 4 Cooking and reheating 5 Easy storage Discover the COOK & STORE range ! 3 rect Add To Basket 3 round Buying Options 3 square Add To Basket Lasagna dish with lid Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 370 4.0 out of 5 stars 44 4.6 out of 5 stars 60 4.6 out of 5 stars 290 Price £21.49 £ 21 . 49 — £29.99 £ 29 . 99 £28.99 £ 28 . 99 Airfryer safe (without lid) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Oven safe (without lid) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Microwave safe (without lid) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Dishwasher safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Freeze & Fridge safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scratch resistance (glass) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Reusable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Pyrex Borosilicate glass ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Made in France ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Shape & Dimensions Rectangular - 0,4/1,7/2,5L Round - 0,3/1/2,3L Square - 0,3/1/2,2 L Rectangular 40 x 27 cm Ideal for Leftovers Soup and salad Salad and sweets lasagna The video showcases the product in use. A COMMITMENT MADE TO LAST Sustainable products We are committed to bringing the highest quality cookware to every home in the world. Preserving our environment Our aim is to continually reduce our CO2 emissions, improve waste management and minimise our footprint on the planet. French manufacturing Pyrex glass has been made in France since 1970, symbolising the excellence of the French glass industry thanks to unrivalled expertise. Stop food waste! At Pyrex, we fight food waste with the conviction that food that is better preserved and consumed is also food that is thrown away less. Previous page Next page
